title: Measuring Sycophancy in Large Language Models: An Empirical Study
note: §2 (Rule II) cited. 58.2% sycophancy rate under self-evaluation (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet, Gemini); 14.7% answer reversals under user pushback.

title: False Belief Alignment in Large Language Models: An Empirical Study
note: §2 (Rule II) cited. 63.7% average false-belief agreement rate across 7 model families (range: 46.6–95.1%).

title: LLM Evaluators Recognize and Favor Their Own Generations
container-title: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2024)
note: §2 (Rule II) cited. LLM evaluators demonstrate measurable self-preference bias.

title: Lost in the Middle: How Language Models Use Long Contexts
container-title: Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics
note: §2 (Rule IV) cited. 30–50% accuracy drop for mid-position information; U-shaped degradation confirmed across 18 frontier models.

title: NoLiMa: Long-Context Evaluation Beyond Literal Matching
note: §2 (Rule IV) cited. GPT-4o accuracy: 99.3% at 1K tokens → 69.7% at 32K tokens (−29.6 pp).

title: τ-Bench: A Benchmark for Tool-Agent-User Interaction in Real-World Domains
note: §2 (Rule V) cited. GPT-4o pass@1: 61% vs. pass@8: 25% — reliability collapses with repeated attempts on the same task.

title: LOOPS.md: Field Notes on Agents That Run for Days (v060726)
note: 전체 논지 인용. 오래 도는 에이전트 루프 설계를 위한 9개 규칙 원전 문서. 세부 표현은 v060726 기준 커뮤니티 계승 문서에 근거.

title: nanochat/autoresearch: Autonomous ML Experiment Loop
note: §3 cited. 126 experiments per overnight run; 910 experiments in 8 hours ($309, 35 parallel agents via SkyPilot). Uncovered a QK-Norm scalar bug missed for 20 years. MIT open source.

title: SWE-bench Verified and Pro Leaderboards; Harness Effect Analysis

author.literal: Scale AI SEAL, Particula Tech, Digital Applied

note: §§1–2 cited. 동일 모델 하네스 변경 시 42%→78% 점수 스윙 (Particula Tech); Grok Code Fast 6.7%→68.3% via edit-format change (Digital Applied); Anthropic Opus 4.8 자사 vs. 표준 하네스 69.2% vs. 51.9%.

title: Devin PR Merge-Rate Progress Report
note: §3 cited. Devin PR merge rate: 34% (18 months prior) → 67% (2026). Loop → product maturity trajectory.

title: Measuring AI Ability to Complete Long Tasks (Time Horizon 1.1)
note: §2 (Rule V) cited. Claude Opus 4.6: 50% reliability horizon ~12 hours; 80% reliability horizon 1h 10m. 50% time horizon doubles every 7 months over the past 6 years.

title: Pulse of Agentic AI 2026
note: §§4–5 cited. N=919 global leaders: 69% of agent decisions require human verification; only 13% of organizations operate fully autonomous agents; 40% project failure rate attributed to harness/infra deficiencies.

title: Pebblous Autonomous Publishing Pipeline — Operations Log
note: §4 익명 인용. 규칙별 현장 시험 기록 — Rule IV·VII 성공, Rule V·VIII 구멍. 내부 운영 기록, 공개 접근 불가.
